title: Requirements Change-Verification verdict
description: Standalone output of the appsec-reviewer subagent (verify-requirements skill). NOT a threat-model render fragment — it never enters compose_threat_model.py. The agent writes only this structured data; scripts/requirements_gate.py reads it to compute the deterministic exit code. See docs/proposal-requirements-verifier-subagent.md.

base_ref.description: The git ref the diff was taken against (display/audit).

priority_floor.description: Requirements at or above this priority are eligible to gate (the skill passes its resolved floor; the agent echoes it).

requirements_source.description: remote | cached | local — provenance of the catalog.

gating_failures.description: Agent's own count of in-scope FAIL at/above floor. Advisory — requirements_gate.py recomputes authoritatively from results[].

status.description: PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL/UNVERIFIABLE mirror audit-security-requirements. NOT_APPLICABLE = candidate from the keyword pre-filter that the agent judged not actually implicated by this diff (never gates).

in_scope.description: false ⇒ NOT_APPLICABLE; such results are recorded for transparency but never gate.

finding.description: One concrete sentence naming the file/function/config and the mechanism.

gating.description: Agent's advisory flag; requirements_gate.py recomputes the authoritative value from status + priority + in_scope.
